title: Figure 3: BNT162b1 – Functional 50% SARS-CoV-2 neutralizing antibody titers (VN50) – IMM
description:
Figure 3: BNT162b1 – Functional 50% SARS-CoV-2 neutralizing antibody titers (VN50) – IMM
VN50 titers with 95% confidence intervals are shown for younger participants (aged 18 to 55 years) immunized with
1, 10, 30, 50, or 60 μg BNT162b1.
